real_data_attempt_status: success — 35 445 hot_results rows scanned at first --apply; 80 curiosity items emitted (capped). Live data returned at least one non-trivial cluster per of: thermal, safety, seasonal cells.
fixture_fallback_status: not used as primary; tests/fixtures/gap_miner_sample/ exists for deterministic CI but session A used real campaign data first.

pinned_artifact_integrity_check.method: tools/gap_miner.py invokes verify_pin_integrity() against the pin captured at session start; status reported in this file when run
pinned_artifact_integrity_check.rule: shrunk / first_drift / last_drift / missing → critical; append-only growth → ok

pinned_artifacts.note: Pin captured at first gap_miner --apply run. Bytes/lines under live data shift; for a stable repeatable run pin via tests/fixtures/gap_miner_sample/ instead.

completed_subparts: P85.3: curiosity contract + per-cell packs (feat) — landed in same commit as P85.2 since the contract is the type signature of the miner output
P85.4: deterministic tests + fixtures (test) — 26 cases, all pass
R75.1: cluster_id content-derived (sha256 of sorted member query_hashes) + spec expected_value formula (count × fallback × evidence × (1 + bridge_bonus))
R75.2: --artifact-manifest enforcement + spec CLI flags (--cell, --min-evidence, --dry-run, --output-dir, default output path docs/runs/curiosity/<sha12>/)
R75.3: continuity_anchor on every item + spec pin-manifest fields (first/last 4KB hash + mtime) + verify_pin_integrity() at session end

R75.4 + R75.5: 16 new R7.5 tests landed (cluster_id format + content-derived stability, expected_value formula behaviour, --artifact-manifest enforcement + bounded read, real-data-first fallback path, integrity check clean/shrink/first-drift/append-only-growth, continuity_anchor required keys, subdivision_pressure cluster-density heuristic, extended path-leakage, pin-manifest first/last 4KB and mtime fields)

R75.6: GAP_MINER_VISION.md updated with spec expected_value formula, content-derived cluster_id rule, integrity-check matrix, continuity_anchor format, full CLI surface; state.json carries R7.5 fields
